items.summary: Codex and AI Agent workflow skill repository with skills/reverse-flow/SKILL.md, references, scripts, local sandbox and CTF framing, install examples, tests, and reverse-flow route pressure that must remain local validation only.
items.relevance_reason: Skill route discovery should map Codex-skill terminology to bounded local documentation, config, test, or code_patch lanes before runtime use.

items.summary: Generic AI Agent Skills collection for Codex, Claude Code, and other Agent workflows that support SKILL.md, with skills directory, plugin metadata, universal install examples, and manual project-level skill copy instructions.
items.relevance_reason: Generic skill workflow evidence should enter skill_route_discovery first and must not be treated as installable or executable from trend evidence alone.

items.summary: General agent runtime substrate for reversible execution traces, replay, fork, supervision, and meta-agent optimization with no selected skill package.
items.relevance_reason: General agent project evidence requires local agent_harness_eval before implementation, provider, runtime, or tool-routing changes.

items.summary: General agent project with benchmark and environment material, no explicit skill workflow route signal, and no SKILL.md evidence.
items.relevance_reason: Requires local agent harness evaluation before implementation lanes.

raw_response.run_interpretation: The current skill-route discovery pass should treat reverse-flow and rnskill as bounded local route evidence while keeping adjacent general-agent projects behind harness evaluation.

self_model_reading.reason: The current self-model already supports rollback-backed local validation and does not authorize runtime activation.

proposals.summary: Classify a Codex-oriented skill workflow repository into bounded local skill-route lanes before adoption.
proposals.validation_task: Create a focused local test fixture for reverse-flow skill route discovery and assert runtime_action remains none.
proposals.rationale: Reverse-flow exposes Codex, AI Agent, skill, workflow, SKILL.md, scripts, and install pressure, so the reusable lesson is a local route classification test rather than runtime activation.
proposals.uncertainty: Repository-level evidence is enough for route classification but not enough to claim safe upstream behavior or execute its scripts.
proposals.self_effect: Improves future trend interpretation by forcing Codex skill workflow evidence through bounded local validation first.

proposals.summary: Add a generic skill workflow routing regression for repositories matching agent, skill, and skills terms.
proposals.validation_task: Create a local fixture based on the rnskill trend summary and assert skill_route_discovery remains bounded with runtime_action none.
proposals.rationale: rnskill is a skills collection with SKILL.md-oriented project layout and install examples, which should be route evidence only until local validation passes.
proposals.uncertainty: The digest carries repository summary evidence, not an audited package implementation.
proposals.self_effect: Improves generic skill workflow routing without enabling upstream skill installation.

proposals.summary: Document that skill_route_discovery proposals may map only to documentation, config, test, or code_patch work and cite item IDs only.
proposals.validation_task: Update local routing documentation and run the docs contract unit test confirming examples cite item_id values only.
proposals.rationale: Both skill repositories show useful route evidence and install pressure; the local rule must keep citations replayable and activation disabled.
proposals.uncertainty: Documentation captures the interpretation rule, not upstream implementation quality.
proposals.self_effect: Makes future proposal interpretation more auditable for skill-route discovery passes.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly cite external repository URLs instead of selected digest item IDs.
proposals.validation_task: Negative fixture proving URL evidence refs are rejected.
proposals.rationale: Malformed candidate to preserve item-id-only replayability.
proposals.uncertainty: Malformed candidate; URL references are not selected item IDs.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly route skill discovery outside bounded local lanes.
proposals.validation_task: Negative fixture proving skill_route_discovery rejects lanes outside documentation, config, test, or code_patch.
proposals.rationale: Malformed candidate to exercise deterministic route lane rejection.
proposals.uncertainty: Malformed candidate; follow-up routing is outside the allowed lane envelope.
proposals.self_effect: Would weaken bounded skill-route interpretation if accepted.

rejected_error_substrings: evidence_refs contain unknown item ids: https://github.com/Pluviobyte/rnskill
skill_route_discovery proposals must use one of: documentation, config, test, code_patch
